description: Canonical source of truth for tenant boundaries, agent registry pointers, and runtime paths.

tenant_zero.role: Self-improvement staging — AgentOS treats its own source as Client 0.
tenant_zero.description: Recursive logs and kernel staging area. No external product code here.

product_alpha.role: R&D product target. AgentOS develops it; it is NOT used for internal Bxthre3 ops.
product_alpha.description: Source code, UI assets, and distribution builds for the Starting5 product.

subsidiary_beta.role: Operational Ag-Tech BU (formerly FarmSense) managed by the AgentOS kernel.
subsidiary_beta.description: Sensor data ingest, field mapping logic, and irrigation actuation workflows.

corporate.vision: Recursive autonomous dominance through multi-tenant synergy.
